# Spark Personal OS

> AI-powered personal productivity and life management system with Hebrew UI support.

## Core Files

- [App.tsx](./App.tsx): Root component with providers
- [components/app/AppCore.tsx](./components/app/AppCore.tsx): Main app orchestrator  
- [components/app/AppRouter.tsx](./components/app/AppRouter.tsx): Screen routing with lazy loading
- [types.ts](./types.ts): TypeScript type definitions
- [constants.ts](./constants.ts): App constants and configuration

## Screens (13 lazy-loaded)

- HomeScreen: Dashboard with tasks, habits, widgets
- FeedScreen: RSS feed reader with AI summaries
- LibraryScreen: Notes, projects, books, learning items
- AddScreen: Quick capture with AI categorization
- SettingsScreen: App configuration
- AssistantScreen: AI chat interface
- CalendarScreen: Google Calendar integration
- PasswordManagerScreen: Encrypted vault
- SearchScreen: Global search
- InvestmentsScreen: Portfolio tracker

## Key Concepts

- **PersonalItem**: Universal item type (task, habit, note, goal, etc.)
- **FeedItem**: RSS/Atom feed entries with AI summaries
- **Space**: Organizational groups for items
- **Workout**: Exercise tracking with sets, reps, PRs
- **Settings**: User preferences (theme, language, features)

## Tech Stack

- React 18 + TypeScript
- Vite 6 + Tailwind CSS 4
- Framer Motion animations
- Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Storage)
- Google Gemini AI
- PWA with offline support

## API Integrations

- Google Gemini: Summarization, categorization, chat
- Firebase Auth: Google OAuth
- Google Calendar API: Calendar sync
- RSS Parser: Feed aggregation

## RTL Support

Full Hebrew UI with RTL layout (dir="rtl" on html element).
